name: Calendly
description: An automated scheduling tool that eliminates the back-and-forth of booking meetings. Share a link, the prospect picks a time that works, and the meeting is automatically added to both calendars with a video conferencing link.
whyUseIt: Every email exchange spent negotiating meeting times is friction that could kill a deal. Calendly removes that friction entirely. Your prospect clicks a link, sees your real-time availability, and books instantly. For SDRs booking discovery calls and AEs scheduling demos, Calendly can increase meeting booking rates by 30-50% compared to manual scheduling.
aiCapabilities: Calendly's routing features automatically assign meetings to the right team member based on criteria like territory, deal size, or round-robin. Smart scheduling suggests optimal times based on past booking patterns.
funnelPosition: Full funnel — meeting scheduling from first call through to renewal reviews
sellerWorkflow: Include your Calendly link in email signatures, outreach sequences, and LinkedIn messages. Set up different event types for different meetings (15-min intro, 30-min discovery, 60-min demo). Use round-robin for team scheduling.
managerExpects: Calendly link in all outreach, appropriate event types configured, buffer times set between meetings, and booking analytics reviewed monthly.
demoDescription: Create event types for different meeting types, set availability and buffer times, share the booking link, and review the analytics dashboard showing booking rates and popular times.

vocabulary.definition: A configured meeting template with specific duration, availability, and conferencing settings — e.g. '30-min Discovery Call'.
Automatic distribution of meetings across team members based on availability and workload balancing.

beginnerMistakes: Not setting buffer times between meetings — back-to-back calls with no prep time is a recipe for poor performance
Using a single event type for all meetings — create different types for discovery, demo, and follow-up
Forgetting to integrate with your CRM — meetings booked via Calendly should automatically create activities
